entry.title: McGovern's Warning: What the CIA Doesn't Want Congress to Know
entry.summary:
INTEL Roundtable w/ Johnson & McGovern : Weekly Wrap Enjoy this clip from January 10, 2025! Watch the Full Stream Here: https://www.youtube.com/live/3Ynt0hdk-WQ
Books from Judge Napolitano:
Freedom’s Anchor: An Introduction to Natural Law Jurisprudence in American Constitutional History https://amzn.to/4kDJa6L
Lies the Government Told You: Myth, Power, and Deception in American History https://amzn.to/4kLdexv
It Is Dangerous to Be Right When the Government Is Wrong: The Case for Personal Freedom https://amzn.to/43DcBPG
The Constitution in Exile: How the Federal Government Has Seized Power by Rewriting the Supreme Law of the Land https://amzn.to/3ZGxGaz
A Nation of Sheep https://amzn.to/4jt2jqV
The Freedom Answer Book: How the Government Is Taking Away Your Constitutional Freedoms (Answer Book Series) https://amzn.to/4dCGWlT
Napolitano 3 in 1: Constitutional Chaos, The Constitution in Exile, and A Nation of Sheep https://amzn.to/43HDnq3
Dred Scott's Revenge: A Legal History of Race and Freedom in America https://amzn.to/3SVP5Iq
Suicide Pact: The Radical Expansion of Presidential Powers and the Lethal Threat to American Liberty https://amzn.to/4jiGY3r
Join this channel to get access to perks: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCDkEYb-TXJVWLvOokshtlsw/join

entry.title: Trump Rally Shooting: Inside the Investigation
entry.summary:
Enjoy this clip from July 15, 2024! Watch the Full Stream Here: https://www.youtube.com/live/o66VgnRlS0Q
